text: I feel a sense of curious anticipation. The corridors and glass walls whisper of purpose and progress, yet their sterile shine stands in contrast to the vibrant colors and bold lettering beyond. I am quietly invigorated, aware that I am on the edge of ideas in a place devoted to exploration and innovation. Being here urges me to reflect on the interplay between order and creativity—and I am drawn inward, considering my own evolving role within such a space.
